input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.2.1
            TITLE: the concept for the presentation event will be provided on the fsae online website.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.2.1: The concept for the Presentation Event will be provided on the FSAE Online website.
S.2.2.1 The concept for the Presentation Event will be provided on the FSAE Online website.

final_answer: The concept for the Presentation Event will be provided on the FSAE Online website.
